header.description: Report metadata including plant details, print date, and filter ranges.

rows.description: Line items for material consumption within a batch, showing set vs achieved weights and errors.

totals.description: Aggregated metrics for the current batch, including total weights and error percentages.

semantics: Parameters `from_date` and `to_date` act as hard filters on the `timestamp_utc` column. `batch_no` filters specific batch identifiers. All other tokens are either direct column mappings or computed values based on row data.
transformations: Format all timestamp columns to 'dd-mm-yyyy hh:mm:ss'.
Format all numeric weight columns to 2 decimal places.
Aggregate totals by summing weights and computing total error percentage.
